role_questions.Product Manager: Which users, jobs-to-be-done, MVP goals, and success metrics should guide the product decision?
role_questions.Technical Lead: What evidence affects hardware/software feasibility, integrations, data accuracy, and implementation risk?
role_questions.Business Analyst: What evidence affects market demand, pricing, costs, unit economics, and go-to-market viability?
role_questions.Finance Analyst: What evidence affects unit economics, budget, runway, pricing, and financial risk?
role_questions.UX Researcher: What evidence affects household behavior, pantry workflows, adoption friction, and competitor user experience?
role_questions.Marketing Strategist: What evidence affects positioning, channels, launch motion, and go-to-market validation?
role_questions.Risk & Compliance: What evidence affects regulatory, governance, operational, and reputational risk?
role_questions.MVP Scope Guard: What evidence helps cut scope to the smallest testable product while preserving the core value proposition?
role_questions.Report Generator: What final evidence and decisions should appear in the report?
role_questions.Root Coordinator: What orchestration risks or phase-control concerns should be tracked?
role_questions.default: What evidence should this role verify before making recommendations?
